prompt: Japanese realistic romance movie poster style, inspired by 'We Made a Beautiful Bouquet', a pair of young Japanese couple in their twenties standing in a daily urban scene (street or intersection), maintaining a subtle and realistic distance from each other, no physical contact, like a moment of gradual estrangement in a relationship. The mood is quiet and restrained, with unuttered emotions and a sense of time passing. The composition is the main visual of a movie, characters located at the bottom or to one side, retaining a large area of white space to emphasize space and atmosphere. Light is natural (overcast or dusk), low-saturation gray-blue, beige, and warm gray tones, realistic photography texture. The image has fine film grain and a slight sense of daily life, not intentionally aesthetic, not over-decorated, like a frame from a real movie. A small amount of natural floral materials can be added at the edges or foreground as a metaphor (restrained, not excessive, not decorative). Add the title '花束みたいな恋をした' in the white space area, thin Mincho font, simple and sparse layout; add 'We Made a Beautiful Bouquet' in a smaller font size below. Overall requirements: Real Japanese movie poster texture, artistic, restrained, everyday life, emphasizing relationships over romantic symbols, avoiding sugary romance, avoiding flower piles, avoiding internet celebrity aesthetics, avoiding crowded compositions, avoiding the 'exquisite but hollow' AI feel. Negative prompt: AI feel, over-aesthetic, sea of flowers, romantic filters, excessive lighting effects, high saturation, neon lights, intimate couple embrace, posed feel, photobooth composition, internet celebrity style, illustration feel, 3D rendering, cluttered elements. Japanese minimalist artistic movie poster style, inspired by 'Love Letter', winter snow scene, a close-up of a young woman's face, face close to or semi-buried in the snow, tiny snowflakes falling naturally. The composition is a restrained close-up side profile or slightly tilted face, with the person occupying a large proportion of the screen but not overly sharp, edges slightly softened or slightly out of focus. Expression is calmness after sadness, with tears or tear marks in the eyes, emotions introverted and restrained, like having just cried and slowly returning to silence, eyes not looking at the camera, with a sense of memory and void. Light is winter natural scattered light or overcast soft light, cool white, light gray, pale blue tones, low saturation, low contrast, no strong shadows, no dramatic lighting effects. The snow and air form a clean background. The image texture is between real photography and film, with fine grain, slight mist, slightly white or slightly overexposed, like an old photo faded by time or a movie still. Skin not overly detailed, no skin smoothing, no sharpening, no retouching. Asymmetric composition, face can be partially cropped, minimalist background, retaining appropriate white space. Add the minimalist title 'Love Letter' or 'ラヴレター' in the white space area, thin Mincho or thin serif font, wide character spacing, sparse layout, color light gray; add 'Love Letter' in a tiny font size below. Overall requirements: Real Japanese artistic movie poster texture, quiet, subtle, restrained, like a memory covered by snow, avoiding photo studio feel, avoiding internet celebrity aesthetics, avoiding refined filters, avoiding lighting effects, avoiding high contrast and high saturation, avoiding sharp digital feel, avoiding theatrical emotions, avoiding 'pretty but hollow'. Negative prompt: AI feel, skin smoothing, sharpening, HDR, high contrast, high saturation, dreamy light effects, lens flare, filter feel, photo studio style, internet celebrity face, posing, looking directly at the camera, exaggerated emotions, 3D rendering, illustration style, complex background.
